additional_rules.description: GMCC DSCR Rental Flow — qualify investment property loans based on rental income (DSCR ≥ 1.0x or 1.25x depending on investor) rather than personal income. No personal income or employment documentation required. Available in all 49 GMCC-licensed states (excludes AK).
additional_rules.income_docs: No personal income docs. Qualification based on Debt Service Coverage Ratio (rental income / PITIA).
additional_rules.occupancy: Investment property only. Subject property must be (or will be) a rental.
additional_rules.dscr_requirement: Typically DSCR ≥ 1.0x (breakeven) or ≥ 1.25x depending on investor and LTV.
additional_rules.see_guidelines: Refer to GMCC training materials for current LTV, FICO, and reserve requirements.

general_notes: GMCC DSCR Rental Flow — Non-QM investment property program qualifying on rental income (DSCR), not personal income.
No personal income or employment documentation required.
Qualification based on Debt Service Coverage Ratio: rental income / PITIA (typically ≥ 1.0x or ≥ 1.25x).
Available in all 49 GMCC-licensed states (excludes Alaska). Investment property only.
Purchase, rate/term refi, and cash-out refi. SFR, condo, PUD, 2-4 units.
Specific LTV, FICO, reserves, and DSCR minimums vary by investor — refer to GMCC guidelines.
